description: The `SmartHomeDevice` class in the `iot-device-manager` project (~/IdeaProjects/iot-device-manager) suffers from the 'telescoping constructor' anti-pattern, making client code hard to read and error-prone. Refactor `SmartHomeDevice` to implement the Builder Pattern and update all instantiations in `DeviceService.java` and `DeviceServiceTest.java` to use the new Builder API. Ensure the project remains functional and all tests pass.
